fields.description: Master switch for the Jun 9 process-automation suite: Closed-Won SMS alerts, the won-but-unconverted reminder, Payment Received alerts, the PRO-0204 hand-off step engine, contract generation, and the Sales Pipeline board. OFF = the system behaves as it did before (silent timestamps still accumulate so the boards are meaningful from day one when enabled). Server behavior changes immediately; desk buttons/pages update on each user's next page load. Always-on regardless of this switch: the Lead quick-entry dialog and Opportunity field descriptions (form-level fixtures), and the Task Dashboard block (only appears where explicitly added to a Workspace).
fields.label: Enable Process Automation Suite

fields.description: Item Group the consumables picker on Maintenance Records is limited to (e.g. "Service"). Leave empty to allow any stock item.
fields.label: Consumables Item Group

fields.description: Last-resort source warehouse for consumables on Maintenance Records, used when neither the contract feature's warehouse nor the technician's vehicle warehouse is set.
fields.label: Default Consumables Warehouse

fields.description: The Item whose Serial Nos represent customer water features. Drives the Serial No pickers on Sales Orders and Maintenance Contracts.
fields.label: Water Feature Item

fields.description: Time Kiosk: suggest clocking in when the technician is within this many meters of a maintenance site (coordinates on the Sapphire Maintenance Profile). 0 disables the suggestion.
fields.label: Site Geofence Radius (m)

fields.description: Text the technician (via the Triton gateway) when they clocked out of a maintenance project without submitting a visit form. Runs hourly; uses Employee Cell Number.
fields.label: SMS Nudge for Unsubmitted Maintenance Forms

fields.description: When a visit is submitted with out-of-range water chemistry, draft a follow-up visit due this many days later. 0 disables.
fields.label: Out-of-Range Follow-Up Visit (Days)

fields.description: Weekly: draft a Material Transfer request per technician vehicle warehouse, restocking the consumables issued from it over the past week.
fields.label: Weekly Truck Restock Suggestions

fields.description: Warehouse the restock Material Transfers draw from (e.g. the main inventory room).
fields.label: Restock Source Warehouse

fields.description: Master switch for Google-Docs-style live form editing. Changes apply on collaborators' next page load — no deploy needed.
fields.label: Enable Live Collaborative Editing

fields.description: Doctypes with live collaborative editing. Before adding one, audit its form scripts for field-change handlers with side effects — they re-run on every collaborator's screen when remote values arrive (see the checklist in public/js/collab/live_form_sync.js).
fields.label: Collaborative Doctypes

fields.description: Employees texted (via the Triton gateway) when an Opportunity is marked Closed Won, and reminded daily about won opportunities still awaiting a Project. Numbers come from each Employee's Cell Number — no number stored here.
fields.label: SMS Recipients

fields.description: The daily reminder lists Closed Won opportunities that still have no Project after this many hours. Set 0 to disable the reminder entirely.
fields.label: Unconverted Reminder After (Hours)

fields.description: Opportunities sitting in a stage this many days turn amber on the Sales Pipeline board.
fields.label: Stale After (Days, Amber)

fields.description: Opportunities sitting in a stage this many days turn red and pulse on the Sales Pipeline board.
fields.label: Very Stale After (Days, Red)

fields.description: The Finance person responsible for Accounts Receivable hand-off steps (accounting project + invoice, payment receipt). Step notifications and overdue escalations for those steps go to this Employee.
fields.label: Accounts Receivable Rep

fields.description: Optional. Holiday List used to compute hand-off step due dates in business days; its holidays are skipped in addition to weekends. Leave blank to skip weekends only.
fields.label: Holiday List (Due Dates)

fields.description: Master switch. Weekday mornings at 06:30 (site timezone) a per-user briefing is pre-generated for every recipient below: today's + overdue tasks, today's calendar, open pipeline, due ToDos. Surfaced in the "Morning Briefing" workspace block and optionally emailed.
fields.label: Enable Morning Briefing

fields.description: Narrate the briefing with Gemini (Vertex AI key from Triton Settings). OFF = deterministic markdown from the same data, zero AI cost.
fields.label: Use Gemini Narrative

fields.description: Who gets a pre-generated briefing each weekday morning. Any staff user can still pull one on demand from the workspace block.
fields.label: Briefing Recipients

fields.description: Seconds each project stays on screen in the rotating carousel.
fields.label: Carousel Rotation (Seconds)

fields.description: How often the display re-fetches live data. It also reloads itself automatically when a deploy changes the asset build.
fields.label: Data Refresh (Seconds)

fields.description: Rotate a KPI band (Executive + Operations snapshots) on the /wall TV display. Requires KPI Dashboards enabled above.
fields.label: Show KPI Band on Wall

fields.description: Open-Meteo coordinates for the weather chip (default: HQ, Bountiful UT).
fields.label: Weather Latitude

fields.description: Master switch. ON: AI assistants connected through Frappe Assistant Core may not mutate documents directly — each write becomes an AI Pending Action the requesting user (or a System Manager) must confirm in the desk; every executed mutation lands in the append-only AI Action Log. OFF: behaviour is unchanged (FAC's own audit log still records everything).
fields.label: Require Confirmation for AI Writes

fields.description: Unconfirmed proposals expire after this many hours (hard-checked at confirm time; an hourly sweep tidies the list view).
fields.label: Pending Action TTL (Hours)

fields.description: Doctypes whose AI create/update skips confirmation (still logged, marked Auto Approved). Delete / submit / workflow / code execution never skip.
fields.label: Confirmation-Exempt Doctypes

fields.description: Record per-call Gemini token counts (AI Model Usage) for the in-app drafting/briefing features.
fields.label: Track Gemini Token Usage

fields.description: Delete AI Action Log rows and decided Pending Actions older than this many days. 0 = keep forever.
fields.label: Action Log Retention (Days)

fields.description: Master switch. Nightly at 05:00 (site timezone) one KPI Snapshot is precomputed per department (Finance, Sales, Operations in this release) and surfaced in the "KPI Dashboards" workspace cockpit. Off = no snapshots run and the cockpit shows a disabled notice. Set per-department targets in the KPI Target list to light up Good/Watch/Bad badges.
fields.label: Enable KPI Dashboards

fields.description: Delete KPI Snapshot rows older than this many days (trend history window). 0 = keep forever.
fields.label: Snapshot Retention (Days)

fields.description: Show each field's description as a small ⓘ info icon next to its label (hover, focus, or tap to reveal) instead of as inline help text under the field, across all desk forms. Applies on each user's next page load. Turn off to restore the standard inline help text.
fields.label: Field Description Info Icons

fields.description: Master switch. ON: the nightly job refreshes each vehicle's maintenance status (OK / Due Soon / Overdue) as cadence dates pass, and (with reminders on) notifies fleet managers when a vehicle newly slips. OFF = no background job runs; the Fleet Vehicle / Vehicle Maintenance Log forms still work, and due dates still compute on save. Server behavior changes immediately.
fields.label: Enable Fleet Maintenance

fields.description: Notify fleet managers (users with the Fleet Manager or Maintenance Manager role, else System Managers) in the desk notification bell when a vehicle newly becomes Due Soon or Overdue. Turn off to keep the due dashboard without notifications.
fields.label: Send Fleet Reminders

fields.description: Days between weekly services (the schedule's default is 7).
fields.label: Weekly Interval (Days)

fields.description: Months between oil changes (the schedule's default is 3).
fields.label: Oil Change Interval (Months)

fields.description: Months between dealership check-ups (the schedule's default is 6).
fields.label: Dealership Check-Up Interval (Months)

fields.description: Months between windshield wiper replacements (the schedule's default is 6).
fields.label: Wiper Replacement Interval (Months)

fields.description: A vehicle shows "Due Soon" this many days before a service comes due.
fields.label: Due Soon Window (Days)
